Why moringa

Six powerful benefits

Commonly known as Sahjan or Shevga in India — moringa has been used for centuries in traditional wellness practices.

Strengthens immunity

Rich in Vitamin C and antioxidants that help protect and fortify the immune system daily.

Boosts energy

Natural iron and protein provide sustained energy without caffeine or artificial stimulants.

Reduces inflammation

Anti-inflammatory plant compounds support joint comfort and post-activity recovery.

Good for skin & hair

Vitamins A and E nourish skin and promote strong, healthy hair growth from within.

Improves bone health

Contains 17x more calcium than milk — supports strong, healthy bones over time.

Supports overall wellness

A complete plant superfood that complements a balanced diet and active lifestyle.

Nutrient power

A plant-based superfood

Moringa naturally outperforms everyday foods in key nutrients — here's how it compares.

15x
More potassium than banana
17x
More calcium than milk
7x
More Vitamin C than oranges
25x
More iron than spinach
9x
More Vitamin A than carrots
4x
More protein than egg

How to use

Easy to add to any routine

Simple, fast, and effective — no preparation hassle. Just mix and go.

💧

Mix with lukewarm water

🥤

Blend into a smoothie

🍋

Mix with lemon & honey

🫖

Brew as moringa tea

🥗

Sprinkle on salad & fruits

🍚

Add to curd or food

Recommended usage: Add 1 teaspoon of Moringa Powder to 150–200 ml of lukewarm water or mix into your favourite beverage. Shake well before use.

Our process

From farm to your kitchen

Simple processing, clean ingredients, consistent quality — every batch.

1

Harvest

Selected moringa leaves are handpicked at peak ripeness from quality farms.

2

Wash & sort

Thoroughly cleaned and sorted to remove impurities before drying.

3

Dehydrate

Low-heat drying preserves natural color, nutrients, and aroma.

4

Grind & pack

Fine-milled to a smooth texture and sealed in airtight, food-grade packaging.

About Gunaveda

Inspired by traditional Indian wellness

Gunaveda is committed to bringing pure, natural herbal products inspired by traditional Indian wellness practices. We believe that everyday health should be simple, accessible, and based on clean nutrition.

Our products are carefully sourced from quality raw materials and processed with attention to hygiene and consistency. We focus on delivering natural, plant-based products without unnecessary additives or preservatives — so you can confidently include them in your daily routine.

At Gunaveda, our aim is to provide reliable quality at an affordable price, making natural nutrition a part of every household. We value trust, simplicity, and transparency in everything we offer.

Thank you for choosing Gunaveda.

Safety & usage

Important information

Please read before use.

Safety warnings

  • Do not exceed the recommended daily intake.
  • Not recommended for children unless advised by a healthcare professional.
  • Pregnant or lactating women should consult a doctor before use.
  • If you have a medical condition or are on medication, seek medical advice before consumption.
  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and moisture.
  • Keep container tightly sealed after use to maintain product quality.
  • Keep out of reach of children.
  • Do not use if the safety seal is broken, missing, or damaged.

Storage & handling

  • Store in a cool, dry place away from direct sunlight and moisture.
  • Always keep the pack tightly sealed after use.
  • Best before 12 months from the date of packaging.
  • Product characteristics such as texture, color, and aroma may vary due to the natural nature of raw material — this does not affect quality.
  • Due to natural variation, color and taste may differ slightly between batches.
  • Perform a patch test before topical use as per individual preference.

Legal disclaimer

Gunaveda Moringa Powder is a natural, plant-based product intended for general use. It is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease. The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. Consult a qualified healthcare professional before use if you are pregnant, nursing, or have any specific medical condition. Use as per individual preference or recommended quantity.
